summary: Skill creation protocol + learn-from-session enrichment candidate detection + heavy-skill pre-cascade gate posture. Pure protocol/documentation pass — no code changes.
notes: Protocol doc + SKILL.md enrichment + voice.md rule. Agent reads these on next session boot. Zero data/infra impact.

changes.note: Canonical protocol for skill creation : detection, graduation matrix (specific/heavy/macro), three operator validation gates, extend_before_create, rollback/sunset.
New section 'Enrichment candidate detection' with three classes (A skill candidates, B SOP/doc enrichment, C convention promotion). Max 3 per class per session close. oui/non/plus tard answer space.
New section 'Heavy skill posture — always ask before cascade'. Hard rule : no cascade >3 subagents without gate, no execution >20k estimated tokens without gate. Canonical surface pattern.
Prepend v2.6.18 entry with rationale + known gaps.

post_steps: No action required. Protocol applies on next agent session.
